steps.title: Modeling the cost structure
steps.content:
The equipment rental cost has a first-day charge of 72n dollars and additional daily charges of 36n dollars per day beyond the first.

For $ x $ days, the first day is charged, and the remaining $ x-1 $ days incur 36n dollars each. Total cost formula: $$ 72n + 36n(x - 1) $$ Simplify: $$ 72n + 36nx - 36n = 36n + 36nx = 36nx + 36n $$

steps.title: Backsolving — testing the correct answer (36nx + 36n)
steps.content: Plug in $ x = 1 $ (first day only): $$ C(1) = 36n(1) + 36n = 72n $$ Matches the given 72n dollars for the first day. For $ x = 2 $: $$ C(2) = 36n(2) + 36n = 108n $$ Which is 72n dollars (first day) + 36n dollars (second day). Correct. A is correct.
